name: Concept Fasteners
message: Concept Fasteners are dedicated to manufacturing & distributing the highest quality products suited to the industrial, Automotive, Rail and electronics industry.Fasteners, standoffs, Thumb Screws, Brass Inserts, Machined parts,Tee locks, Compression locks, Over centre Latches, Locks, Latches, Piano Hinge, Heavy Duty Drawer Slides, Gas Struts, Security Seals, Fine Thread Fasteners for Automotive applications, Self Clinching Machines, Latest Product are Safety bolts with indicators,NSW office for all your General Fasteners including Structural Fasteners for the Building Industry.https://conceptfasteners.com.au/
